title: Pixel Art Creation with high Creative Thinking
body:
**Goal**
Generate a pixel art image and submit it as a file in the project.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Image is original pixel art, theme and subject are your choice
- [ ] Submitted as a `.png`, `.jpg`, or `.jpeg` file under `/assets/pixel-art/`
- [ ] Minimum canvas size of 64x64 pixels
- [ ] PR description includes a one-line note on what you made and why

/bounty $780
